name: Executive Coaching Intake
description: Executive coaching engagement intake for leaders seeking performance improvement, leadership transition support, or development in a specific capability area. Evaluates coaching mandate, development goal specificity, coachee readiness, sponsor alignment, confidentiality structure, and measurement approach to produce an executive coaching profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended engagement structure.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Executive Coaching Profile
types.description: Generated executive coaching profile from intake session data.
